steps.title: Start with slope form
steps.content:
The slope is $6$, so write the function as
$$
g(x)=6x+b
$$

steps.title: Use the given point
steps.content: Substitute the point $(3,50)$: $50=6(3)+b$, so $50=18+b$ and $b=32$. Thus $g(x)=6x+32$, which has slope $6$ and gives $g(3)=50$. The answer is D.
